benefits.description: Went from 250 to 228 lbs over approximately 3 months
Appetite remained suppressed for approximately 1.5 weeks after stopping; reduced cravings for sweet treats persisted after coming off

side_effects.description: Appetite suppression made it hard to consume adequate protein, leading to significant strength loss; hunger rebounded stronger than baseline approximately 2 weeks after finishing

protocol_notes: Used 1mg/week for about 3 months; finished before a 2-week vacation. Weight remained stable on vacation, then increased after hunger returned. Plans to use only during summer cuts going forward. Now maintaining with high protein diet and cardio.
